goal: Capture a readiness score, present safe guidance, and route interested visitors to follow-up or review.

stages.label: Awareness
stages.description: Visitor lands on the scorecard page or opens the widget.

stages.label: Assessment
stages.description: Visitor completes the funding readiness questions.

stages.label: Result
stages.description: Visitor sees score, tier, risks, strengths, and next steps.

stages.label: Lead Capture
stages.description: Visitor opts in to share contact details for follow-up.

stages.label: Routing
stages.description: Submission can go to score submission, partner matching, or human review.
